description_long: This stretcher features a blue cushioned mattress pad supported by a robust black metal frame, designed for patient transport in medical emergencies. The frame is equipped with multiple black wheels for smooth mobility and maneuverability across urban surfaces. Side rails are present on both sides, providing safety and preventing accidental falls during movement. The head section of the stretcher is slightly elevated, offering ergonomic support for the patient. Handles are integrated at both ends, allowing for manual lifting or pushing by medical personnel. The overall construction suggests durability and ease of use in fast-paced urban healthcare scenarios.
description: A blue-cushioned medical stretcher with black metal frame, wheels, side rails, and handles for safe patient transport.
description_view_0: Front view showing the blue mattress pad, headrest, and handles at the foot end, with side rails visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the full length of the stretcher, the elevated headrest, side rails, and all six wheels.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the headrest, rear handles, and the alignment of the wheels and frame.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the blue mattress, side rails, and the structure of the collapsible frame and wheels.
